summary: Delta v6 testing complete - all 6 requested changes verified. 13/13 backend tests pass (Float opening=5300, Misc Payments CRUD, Inventory without cost_per_unit, Banking backdated, Void endpoint removed 404, Walk-in inline). Frontend UI verified via Playwright: inline walk-in checkbox+guests input on Billing, Misc Payments full modal with all data-testids, owner dashboard read-only, Inventory table/modal has no Cost/Unit, DBilling has no Status/Void column or button, /entry/bills redirects away, Banking modal has eb-date picker, sidebar Bills gone + Misc Payments added.
critical_code_review_comments: misc_payments_router.py: delete endpoint does not check if ObjectId is valid before calling ObjectId(entry_id); could raise 500 on malformed id. Minor - wrap in try/except or validate.
billing_router.py: still stores is_voided:False on every bill - dead field since void is removed. Safe to keep for now, but consider cleanup on next migration.
Banking/Misc Payment POST endpoints accept arbitrary date strings without validating YYYY-MM-DD format. Pydantic could enforce regex pattern for stricter contract.
float_router.FLOAT_OPENING is a module constant; if business wants to change it again, it requires code deploy. Consider config/env var.
MiscPayments router has no update (PUT) endpoint - only create/delete. Acceptable if product doesn't need edit, otherwise note as gap.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up within tests (TEST_ prefix). One existing misc payment row remained from prior iteration alongside the freshly created one, was deleted after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_delta_v6.py covers all delta v6 items. For Playwright, useful selectors: billing-log-walkin-toggle, billing-walkin-guests, misc-add-btn, misc-amount, misc-source, misc-category, misc-mode-cash, misc-save-btn, misc-row-<id>, del-misc-<id>, misc-date-picker, eb-date. Owner can visit /entry/* routes (no owner-block). /entry/bills redirects to /dashboard/overview (fallback). DBilling headers confirmed: Bill #, Time, Customer, Items, Payment, Total, (actions-blank).

verified_flows.misc_payments_employee_ui: PASS - all data-testids present, create+delete round-trip works
verified_flows.misc_payments_owner_ui_readonly: PASS - no add button, no delete buttons
verified_flows.inventory_no_cost_per_unit: PASS - backend accepts missing field (default 0.0), frontend table and modal have no Cost/Unit
verified_flows.banking_backdated: PASS - POST with date:'2026-01-15' stores that date; default today when omitted; modal has eb-date ThemeDatePicker
verified_flows.void_removed: PASS - POST /api/bills/{id}/void returns 404, /entry/bills route redirects, sidebar Bills link gone, DBilling no Status/Void column or button
verified_flows.billing_inline_walkin_ui: PASS - billing-log-walkin-toggle checkbox present, toggling reveals billing-walkin-guests input
verified_flows.walkin_backend_still_working: PASS - POST /api/walkins succeeds, confirming inline walk-in will post successfully
verified_flows.bill_create_regression: PASS - bill creation still works, is_voided defaults False
